name: Quantifind
description: Quantifind applies AI to structured and unstructured external data to streamline AML, KYC and investigations workflows, with risk screening partnerships with major banks and government agencies.

seo.title: Quantifind — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Quantifind: Quantifind applies AI to structured and unstructured external data to streamline AML, KYC and investigations workflows, with risk screening partners

when_to_use: AI-driven AML risk screening across structured and unstructured data
KYC investigation enrichment from open-source intelligence
Financial crime alert triage via AI entity resolution
SAR investigation support with automated link analysis
Sanctions evasion pattern detection for bank compliance teams

pros: Used by major banks and government agencies
Adds external risk context beyond watchlists
Strong on adverse media and entity resolution
cons: Heavy contracts aimed at tier-1 customers
Overlap with adverse media tools muddies value
review.verdict: AI investigations layer for large banks and agencies, not a starter AML screening API.
review.best_for: Tier-1 banks and government agencies running complex AML investigations at enterprise scale
review.not_for: Fintechs just needing sanctions and PEP screening with a developer-friendly API

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
